#+TITLE: Config file CUPS printers
#+AUTHOR: Rafael Ito
#+PROPERTY: header-args :tangle printers.conf
#+DESCRIPTION: config file for CUPS printers
#+STARTUP: showeverything
#+auto_tangle: t

* Table of contents :toc_2:
- [[#header][Header]]
- [[#lbic][LBiC]]
  - [[#hp-laserjet-p3005dn][HP LaserJet P3005dn]]

* Header
#+begin_src conf
# Printer configuration file for CUPS v2.4.16
# Written by cupsd
# DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE WHEN CUPSD IS RUNNING
NextPrinterId 2
#+end_src
** Description :noexport:
This file should be placed in =/etc/cups/printers.conf=.
* LBiC
** HP LaserJet P3005dn
#+begin_src conf
<DefaultPrinter HP-LaserJet-p3005>
PrinterId 1
UUID urn:uuid:8450e67e-072e-3bdd-6033-716590438bfb
Info HP LaserJet p3005
Location LBiC
MakeModel HP LaserJet p3005 pcl3, hpcups 3.25.8
DeviceURI hp:/net/HP_LaserJet_P3005?ip={{ ip_printer_lbic_laserjet_p3005dn }}
State Idle
StateTime 1773863024
ConfigTime 1773863013
Type 36884
Accepting Yes
Shared Yes
JobSheets none none
QuotaPeriod 0
PageLimit 0
KLimit 0
OpPolicy default
ErrorPolicy stop-printer
</DefaultPrinter>
#+end_src
